title: Migraine follow-up

red_flags.text: Supports recording headache frequency, duration, severity, intervention effectiveness, impact, and clinician-led further investigation or referral when red flags develop.

red_flags.evidence_extract: Supports recording headache frequency, duration, severity, intervention effectiveness, impact, and clinician-led further investigation or referral when red flags develop.

medication.text: Supports headache location, quality, severity, duration, frequency, activity impact, nausea, vomiting, light or sound sensitivity, aura, menstrual relation, and medication-overuse review.

medication.text: Supports documentation that an acute or preventive migraine plan was clinician-decided and that prophylaxis was reviewed; no medicine name or dose is mapped.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Diagnosis, aura, frequency, duration, severity, disability, diary, triggers, medicines, adherence, response and adverse effects are absent.
No diagnosis, interpretation, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, escalation or disposition is generated for migraine follow-up.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
